G0.label:
α : Type u_1
a : α
s₁ : List α
b : α
s₂ t₁ t₂ : List α
h : a :: s₁ ++ t₁ = b :: s₂ ++ t₂
hl : (a :: s₁).length = (b :: s₂).length
ih : s₁ ++ t₁ = s₂ ++ t₂ → s₁.length = s₂.length → s₁ = s₂ ∧ t₁ = t₂
⊢ a :: s₁ = b :: s₂ ∧ t₁ = t₂

G1.label:
α : Type u_1
a : α
s₁ : List α
b : α
s₂ t₁ t₂ : List α
h : a :: s₁ ++ t₁ = b :: s₂ ++ t₂
hl : (a :: s₁).length = (b :: s₂).length
ih : s₁ ++ t₁ = s₂ ++ t₂ → s₁.length = s₂.length → s₁ = s₂ ∧ t₁ = t₂
⊢ a :: s₁ = b :: s₂ ∧ t₁ = t₂
